messages.content: Which European country was the most populous in the year 1972?
The most populous European country in the year 1972 was Germany, with a population of 82,400,000.
Which is the most populous today?
The most populous country in the world is China, with a population of over 1.4 billion people.
Could you provide a breakdown of approximate population numbers for the most populous european countries?
Sure! The most populous European countries in 20
